metadata.title: Template Gallery
metadata.description: See how the fixed resume workflow is organized.

showcases.title: The first release ships one template and one clear workflow
showcases.description: The product surface is intentionally narrow: fixed template control, JD-based tailoring, and export-ready delivery.

items.title: Xiaoming fixed template
items.description: The first controlled Word template keeps profile, education, work, internships, venture experience, skills, and bilingual addendum in one repeatable structure.

items.title: Structured JD tailoring
items.description: The rewrite flow is built around structured sections, making it easier to compare the original draft against the tailored version for a target job.

items.title: Export delivery panel
items.description: Word and PDF are generated from the same structured source so the final packet remains consistent and template-safe.

cta.title: Use the gallery as the product contract
cta.description: Every future template should fit the same product flow: extract, edit, tailor, export.
